trends.name: Hario V60 NEO
trends.buzz: Hario refreshed its iconic cone in durable Tritan; new colorways at World of Coffee.
trends.angle: The brewer that taught a generation, leveled up — what changed and why clarity still wins.

trends.name: xBloom Studio
trends.buzz: All-in-one grind+brew+scale that automates a pour-over from a card; reviewers call it a friendly assistant.
trends.angle: Tech-ista heaven: automation that lowers the barrier instead of gatekeeping.

trends.name: Hario Switch
trends.buzz: Immersion-then-drain hybrids keep trending for forgiving, repeatable cups.
trends.angle: The most forgiving way in — a recipe anyone nails first try.
